MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER ON MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MGM'S CABINET INSTALLATION SERVICE'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. (CODE CIV. PROC. 426.50, 428.50(C); SILVER ORGANIZATIONS LTD. V. FRANK (1990) 217 CAL.APP.3D 94, 98-99 [EVEN ON "EVE OF TRIAL," LEAVE TO FILE COMPULSORY CROSS-COMPLAINT IS MANDATORY ABSENT BAD FAITH].) PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT DEFENDANT IS ACTING IN BAD FAITH OR HAS UNDULY DELAYED TO HIS PREJUDICE. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. ***After the hearing, submitted dismssal is filed.*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Continued To Dec-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Continued To Aug-15-19 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 210

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MGM'S CABINET INSTALLATION SERVICE's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint:

Defendant MGM's Cabinet Installation Service's motion for leave to file cross-complaint is granted. (Code Civ. Proc. 426.50, 428.50(c); Silver Organizations Ltd. v. Frank (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 94, 98-99 [even on "eve of trial," leave to file compulsory cross-complaint is mandatory absent bad faith].) Plaintiff has not shown that Defendant is acting in bad faith or has unduly delayed to his prejudice.

order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-03-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
